name: AAA Auto Glass Auckland
description: Auckland windscreen and auto glass replacement specialists since 1989. Mobile service, OEM glass, 36+ insurance partners.

tools.name: glass_enquiry
tools.description: Submit a windscreen or auto glass replacement enquiry to AAA Auto Glass Auckland. Use this to request a quote or book a mobile technician.

vehicle.description: Vehicle make, model and year e.g. Toyota RAV4 2022

glass_type.description: Type of glass that needs replacing

insurance.description: Whether the customer is making an insurance claim

notes.description: Additional details such as suburb or best time to call

tools.name: find_make_page
tools.description: Find the AAA Auto Glass page for a specific vehicle make to see models covered and book a windscreen replacement.

make.description: Vehicle make e.g. Toyota, BMW, Tesla

slug.description: URL slug e.g. toyota, bmw, mercedes-benz, range-rover

tools.name: find_insurance_page
tools.description: Find the AAA Auto Glass page for a specific insurance company to understand the claims process.

slug.description: URL slug e.g. aa-insurance, ami-insurance, state-insurance
